CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( "/lightning/r/ContentDocument/" + ContentDocumentId__c + "/view", IF ( ISBLANK( CoverImgVersionId__c ), '', IMAGE("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=thumb240by180&versionId=" & CoverImgVersionId__c & "&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=" & CoverImgContentBodyId__c, "Preview is generating, please refresh later", 90, 120) ), "_parent" )
CustomField.label: Sampling Inspection Img
